title: Edit BOQ Project
description: Rename the project, change its client and currency, then save.

steps.title: Project details
steps.description: Name, client and currency drive every printed deliverable.
steps.voiceScript: Edit the project name, client and currency here.
steps.captionText: Edit the project name, client and currency here.
steps.fallbackMessage: Project details: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Currency
steps.description: The currency shows on every bill and export.
steps.voiceScript: The currency you set flows onto every bill of quantities and export.
steps.captionText: The currency you set flows onto every bill of quantities and export.
steps.fallbackMessage: Currency: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Save changes
steps.description: Saved details apply across the whole project.
steps.voiceScript: Save. Your changes apply across the whole project immediately.
steps.captionText: Save. Your changes apply across the whole project immediately.
steps.fallbackMessage: Save changes: not visible on this screen yet.
